description: Get detailed information about a specific light

fields.name: modelKey
fields.description: The model key of the light

fields.name: mac
fields.description: The MAC address of the device

fields.name: lightModeSettings
fields.description: Settings for when and how your light gets activated

children.name: enableAt
children.description: At what time is the lighting mode relevant and acted upon (this has no effect when mode is off).

children.name: isIndicatorEnabled
children.description: Turn on/off floodlight status LED indicator.

children.name: pirDuration
children.description: How long the light stays on after a motion event in milliseconds.

children.name: pirSensitivity
children.description: How sensitive is the PIR to motion (0-100)%.

children.name: ledLevel
children.description: Brightness level of the main LED (1-6).

fields.name: isDark
fields.description: Whether the light is currently sensing that it's in a dark scene.

fields.name: isLightOn
fields.description: Whether the light has its main LED currently enabled.

fields.name: isLightForceEnabled
fields.description: Whether the light has its main LED currently force-enabled.

fields.name: lastMotion
fields.description: Unix timestamp of the last time the PIR motion-detection was triggered.

fields.name: isPirMotionDetected
fields.description: Whether the light PIR is currently detecting motion

fields.name: camera
fields.description: Which camera is configured to be paired to this light.

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/protect/integration/v1/lights/{id}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get light details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/lights/{id}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/protect/integration/v1/lights/{id}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get light details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/lights/{id}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

  },

  },
  "isDark": true,

  "isLightForceEnabled": true,

  "camera": "string"
}
